name: Act on NPS responses with Google Drive and Trello

parameters.text:
=Summarize these KPIs for leadership in 5 bullet points:
{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}

parameters.subject: =✅ Act on NPS responses with Google Drive and Trello — run completed at {{ $now.
parameters.bodyContent: =✅ Act on NPS responses with Google Drive and Trello — run completed at {{ $now.toFormat('HH:mm') }}

parameters.content:
### Hourly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 6 h. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Gather from Google Drive

### Gather from Google Drive

googleDrive — `fileFolder` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Blend Sources · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Gather from Outlook

microsoftOutlook — `getAll` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Blend Sources · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Blend Sources

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Roll Up KPIs

### Roll Up KPIs

Group-by + aggregate (like a pivot table) — turns raw rows into KPI numbers.

Next: Write Executive Summary (AI)

### Write Executive Summary (AI)

Single fixed LLM step (no tool choice) — cheaper and more predictable than an agent.

Ports: ①→ Compose HTML Report · ②→ Capture Failure Context

⚠ failures exit via the error rail

### Groq Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `llama-3.3-70b-versatile`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Write Executive Summary (AI)** as `languageModel`

🔑 Groq API key

### Compose HTML Report

Custom JavaScript: Build an HTML digest table from the aggregated rows

Next: Send Report via Outlook

### Send Report via Outlook

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Tag Pipeline Metadata · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Tag Pipeline Metadata

Shapes the item: writes `pipeline`, `version`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Cap Batch Volume

### Cap Batch Volume

Caps the stream at 100 items to protect downstream quotas.

Next: Save Execution Metadata

### Save Execution Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record — searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Sort Tickets Newest First

### Sort Tickets Newest First

Orders items (newest first) so limits and digests pick the most relevant records.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

### Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Send Summary to Outlook · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Send Summary to Outlook

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Slack

### Escalate Failure to Slack

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

# Act on NPS responses with Google Drive and Trello

**Pattern:** Survey & Feedback · **Level:** Advanced · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Act on NPS responses with Google Drive and Trello. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual escalation is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Gather from Google Drive → Blend Sources → Roll Up KPIs → Write Executive Summary (AI) → Compose HTML Report → Send Report via Outlook → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to survey & feedback without manual effort
- Anyone automating escalation in customer support
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Improves response time
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Runs 24/7 in the background

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; Google OAuth2 / service account; Groq API key; Microsoft OAuth2; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛟 Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3× with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail → context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your escalation process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
